home.title: Milkshakespeare
home.subtitle: Café · Games · Books · Collectibles
home.heroTagline: A cozy café where you can sip craft milkshakes, play retro board games & TCGs, browse books and vinyl, and discover rare collectibles — all under one roof.
home.aboutText: Born from a love of classic literature, tabletop games, and artisanal milkshakes, Milkshakespeare is the place where culture meets comfort. Grab a shake, challenge a friend to chess, or dig through our curated shelves of books, vinyl, and collectible cards.
home.featuredRomeoDesc: A passionate blend of strawberries, raspberries, and a hint of rose.
home.featuredHamletDesc: To drink or not to drink — a deep, brooding dark chocolate shake.
home.featuredMidsummerDesc: Lavender, vanilla bean, and honeycomb in a dreamy swirl.
home.ctaText: Visit us today and discover how the world's greatest stories taste in a glass.
home.galleryGamesDesc: Board games, retro consoles & TCG tables
home.expGamesDesc: Chess, checkers, and classic board games available for everyone.
home.expTCGDesc: Buy, trade, and play your favorite TCGs with fellow enthusiasts.
home.expBooksDesc: Curated shelves of books, CDs, and vinyl records to explore.
home.expCollectiblesDesc: Retro game cartridges, rare cards, figurines, and more.

about.title: About Milkshakespeare
about.headerSubtitle: Café, game lounge, bookshop & collector's paradise
about.storyText: Milkshakespeare was born from a simple idea: combine the warmth of a family café with the thrill of discovery. Our small team of about 10 passionate people runs a space where you can enjoy a craft milkshake inspired by Shakespeare, play a round of chess or your favorite trading card game, and browse shelves filled with books, vinyl records, and rare collectibles.
about.missionText: We believe the best experiences blend flavors, stories, and play. Whether you're sipping a Hamlet Dark Chocolate while flipping through a vintage comic, or battling friends over a TCG tournament, Milkshakespeare is your place to unwind, connect, and discover.
about.valueCraft: Craftsmanship — Every shake is made to order with premium, locally sourced ingredients.
about.valueCreativity: Creativity — We push the boundaries of flavor, just as Shakespeare pushed the boundaries of language.
about.valueCommunity: Community — Our space is a gathering place for gamers, readers, collectors, and lovers of good taste.
about.offerCafe: Craft milkshakes, specialty coffee, teas & pastries
about.offerGames: Chess, checkers, retro board games & TCG tables
about.offerBooks: Curated books, CDs, vinyl records & music memorabilia
about.offerCollectibles: Rare cards, retro game cartridges, figurines & collectibles

bookings.title: The Play is the Thing
bookings.subtitle: Secure your table for the evening's campaign or a casual duel among the stacks.
bookings.eventDnDDesc: Private alcove with DM screen & terrain.
bookings.legalText: By confirming, you agree to the Merchant's Code of Conduct.
bookings.upsellText: Add a round of 'Midsummer Meads' to your table for 20% off today.
bookings.quoteBoardGames: Choose thy game wisely, for in play we reveal our truest selves.
bookings.quoteMTG: Bring your own deck or borrow one of our curated Shakespearean-themed decks at the bar.
bookings.quoteDnD: All the world's a stage, and your campaign is the grandest play of all.
bookings.quoteBookClub: A book is a garden carried in the pocket — and here, tea flows freely.
